result.stdout:
Description:
  EF-Scaffold

Usage:
  Z.Code.EF [options]

Options:
  -c <c>            The name of the class to be generated
  -d <d>            The type of the database [default: sqlserver]
  -n <n>            The namespace of the generated class [default: inspectra-static-zcodee-14e546e0-b402ed2b.Entites]
  -t <t>            The table name of the generated class []
  -output <output>  The output directory for the generated class [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-zcodee-14e546e0-b402ed2b/Entites]
  --version         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information
